training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.target_side: Reactome pathway membership aligned to official K562 target-gene order
pipeline_program.fusion: context-to-pathway class logits pooled back to target genes as gated residual
pipeline_program.prior: Reactome pathway_membership_matrix with zero residual for uncovered targets
pipeline_program.head: parent dense logits plus Reactome pathway pooling residual
pipeline_program.training_strategy: weighted cross entropy from parent config
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: pathway-prior pooling over target genes using source-backed Reactome memberships
